creator: dohzono@axion-software.com
text:
It seems that the committed diff is not the line which I mentioned...

My diff:
- if (preg_match('/=\?([^?]+)\?(q|b)\?([^?]+)\?=/', $ret))
+ if (preg_match('/=\?([^?]+)\?(q|b)\?([^?]+)\?=/i', $ret))

Committed diff:
-    if (preg_match("/^.*\/.*\/.*\/.*\/.*\/.*$/",$ret)) {
+    if (preg_match("/^.*\/.*\/.*\/.*\/.*\/.*$/i",$ret)) {
